description: Style Note fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference ethnic garments and fabric. This stylish stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its fine gossamer quality, placement of motifs and design intricacy. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric caressing your skin. Product Details Black mulberry silk block printed stole, has small uniform print throughout with broad pattern at the border and neatly hemmed edges Material and Care 100% silk Dry clean only Size Length: 200 cm Width: 55 cm
